title: HTools
description: HTools adds hybrid pickaxes that combine the best properties of multiple materials, culminating in the ultimate Vein Miner Pickaxe!
body:
# ⚒️ HTools - Hybrid Tools Revolution

Tired of choosing between speed, durability, and efficiency? **HTools** breaks the boundaries of traditional Minecraft tooling by introducing hybrid crafting technology. Combine the best properties of multiple materials into revolutionary super-tools that redefine what's possible.

## ✨ Features

- **💎 Hybrid Materials**: Forge powerful Diamond-Gold and Netherite-Diamond-Gold ingots
- **⚡ Diamond-Plated Golden Pickaxes**: Merge gold's mining speed with diamond's durability
- **🔥 Netherite-Diamond-Plated Golden Pickaxes**: Merge gold's mining speed with netherite's durability
- **🌋 Vein Miner System**: Mine entire ore veins in one swing with the **Vein Miner Pickaxe**
- **📈 Progressive Upgrades**: Find smithing templates in **Bastion Treasures** to unlock the Vein Miner

## 🔨 Crafting Progression

1. Create **Diamond-Gold Ingots** by combining a diamond and a gold ingot
   ![Recipe diamond-gold ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21ac76f6863ea0d4a8012633f574899b057af988.png)
2. Forge a **Diamond-Plated Golden Pickaxe** for enhanced performance
   ![Recipe diamond-gold pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/300c5af7903a3cf99cf421a12abb5e1512ca2e79.png)
3. Craft **Netherite-Diamond-Gold Ingots** by combining diamond, gold and netherite
   ![Recipe netherite-diamond-gold ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e93aaac00339ce8ee083faddb9a31a25aa586150.png)
4. Forge a **Netherite-Diamond-Plated Golden Pickaxe** for better durability
   ![Recipe netherite-diamond-gold pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e14382827d549e4bed6b6c3492332ac164aec2d.png)
5. Find the **Vein Miner Upgrade** in bastion treasure chests (50% spawn chance)
   ![Vein-Miner Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e8a4d04b85a43c994b77d4877a6304a7a96fa5a.png)
   ![Bastion Treasure Chest Loot Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecf087c4556281e483006362a265e0feadcc8ba9.png)
6. Apply the **Vein Miner Upgrade** to the Netherite-Diamond-Plated Golden Pickaxe
   ![Recipe Vein Miner Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc8826a8033eb2d645b865f86136027b81472f9.png)
7. Dominate mining with the ultimate **Vein Miner Pickaxe**
   
## 📊 Stats

**Diamond-Plated Golden Pickaxe:**
- 1561 Durability (diamond)
- 12 Mining Speed (gold)
- 22 Enchantment Value (gold)

**Netherite-Diamond-Plated Golden Pickaxe:**
- 2031 Durability (netherite)
- 12 Mining Speed (gold)
- 22 Enchantment Value (gold)

**Vein Miner Pickaxe:**
- 4062 Durability (2× netherite)
- 15 Mining Speed
- 30 Enchantment Value
- **Mines whole ore veins**

## 🌍 Language Support

HTools is fully localized in multiple languages:
- 🇬🇧 **English**
- 🇩🇪 **German** (Deutsch)
- 🇮🇹 **Italian** (Italiano)

## 🚀 Coming Soon

This is just the beginning! More hybrid tools are in development:
- **Shovels, Axes, and Hoes** with the same hybrid technology
- **New material combinations** and upgrade paths
- **Additional enchantments** designed specifically for hybrid tools
- **More vein mining capabilities** for different block types

## 💪 Why HTools?

No more compromises. No more tool swapping. Just pure, efficient mining power that scales with your progression. Whether you're strip-mining for diamonds or clearing out massive ore deposits, HTools has the perfect tool for the job.

---

*✨ Transform your mining experience. Craft smarter, mine faster. ⛏️*
